title: tilia pseudorubra
intro: Tilia pseudorubra, also known as the small-leaved linden or small-leafed lime, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Tilia pseudorubra include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Tilia pseudorubra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine.
